{{Infobox group
| name = Readers
| introduced = ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow
}}

''See also: [[Readers Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|Readers are individuals possessing the unique ability to sense, observe, and manipulate human [[Intent]]. While they are medically indistinguishable from ordinary people, they can consciously interact with the [[Intent]] stored within objects. This capability allows them to perform various specialized tasks, such as investigating crimes, crafting tools, creating weapons, conducting sabotage, and uncovering the history of artifacts. They can also awaken objects to change their physical form or increase their power. While most Readers use spoken words to focus their thoughts, the process technically only requires an investment of [[Intent]]. Due to their extraordinary talents, Readers are highly sought after by various [[Guilds]] and hold prestigious, well-paying positions within the [[Empire]]. However, their power places them in a complex social position; they are often viewed as superhuman or even above the law, as their abilities make it difficult for mortal judges to control them. Because of this, organizations exist to monitor and verify their honesty. [[Reading]] is a discipline with significant risks. Attempting to examine the [[Intent]] of [[Elders]] is a major taboo that can lead to insanity, and some Readers have been driven mad by their powers or lost in trances. They may also suffer from "[[Reader burn]]," a condition occurring when their abilities exceed their physical constitution. The scale of a [[Reader]]'s power can vary immensely, ranging from those who focus on minute details to individuals like [[the Emperor]], who can perceive the intentions of entire cities or armies.}}

== Of Sea and Shadow ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Readers]] might be able to craft messages for specific listeners.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c18">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 18</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Readers]] can see visions of the past, goals for the future, dreams, hopes, and nightmares in everyday objects.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c22">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 22</ref>}}

== Of Shadow and Sea ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|Readers are a group capable of utilizing weapons who are widely believed to hold the key to the advancement of humanity. Within the [[Empire]], they were unable to locate any traces of the Kidnapper prior to his passing. Their duties have included performing investigations, such as when Private Readers examined the contents of a wooden case for [[Ulrich Fletcher]]. Additionally, they have been responsible for confirming significant events, including the disappearance of the [[Heart]] on the [[Island]].}}

{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Readers]] in the [[Empire]] were unable to find any trace of the Kidnapper before his death.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c3">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 3</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|Private [[Readers]] invested the contents of a wooden case for [[Ulrich Fletcher]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c4">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Readers]] are a group that can use weapons.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c13">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 13</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Readers]] are believed to be the key to humanity's advancement.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c17">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 17</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Readers]] confirmed the disappearance of the [[Heart]] on the [[Island]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c26">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 26</ref>}}

== Of Dawn and Darkness ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|The [[Readers]] on all three crews worked together to rig a contraption.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c6">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Readers]] believe the physical structure of an [[Awakened object]] changes to align with invested Intent.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c7">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 7</ref>}}

== Of Darkness and Dawn ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|As members of the [[Council of Architects]], Readers are a group often identified by the symbol of an open eye. They occupy a position above the law and maintain a presence within the [[Imperial Guard]]. Their rising influence has led to a decline in the common usage of Optasias. Following an assassination attempt, the group has been examining survivors and specifically checking on [[Lucan]]'s condition. Despite their status, [[Shera]] maintains the belief that Readers ultimately face ordinary deaths.}}

{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Readers]] are members of the [[Council of Architects]].<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c3">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 3</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|The open eye symbol can signify [[Readers]].<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c7">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Readers]] are considered to be above the law.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c11">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|The [[Imperial Guard]] has [[Readers]].<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c13">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 13</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|The rise of [[Readers]] caused the use of Optasias to fall from common usage.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c16">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 16</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Readers]] are currently examining survivors from an assassination attempt.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c17">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 17</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|The [[Readers]] checked [[Lucan]]'s condition.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c17" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Shera]] believes [[Readers]] die ordinary deaths.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c20">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 20</ref>}}

== Of Kings and Killers ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Readers]] are employed by the [[Navigator’s Guild]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c16">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 16</ref>}}

== Of Killers and Kings ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Readers]] are associated with picking up objects with unusual [[Intent]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c14">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Readers]] need weeks to safely and effectively [[Awaken]] anything.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c22">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 22</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|“Our Readers confirmed that the Heart disappeared on the Island.”<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c26" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:Of Sea and Shadow]]
[[Category:Of Dawn and Darkness]]
[[Category:Of Kings and Killers]]
[[Category:Of Shadow and Sea]]
[[Category:Of Darkness and Dawn]]
[[Category:Of Killers and Kings]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire groups]]
